showFloatingHelpersPanel: Show floating helpers panel on OpenFront
hideFloatingHelpersPanel: Hide floating helpers panel on OpenFront
Show floating helpers panel on OpenFront: Show floating helpers panel on OpenFront
If openfront.io was already open when yo: If openfront.io was already open when you installed this extension, reload that tab once. Otherwise the extension will not work on that tab.

Adds a red marker to nation AI names.
Highlights allies with remaining allianc: Highlights allies with remaining alliance time.
Only available in solo or custom games.

Shows predicted enemy nuke landing point: Shows predicted enemy nuke landing points and explosion radius.
Shows predicted enemy nuke landing points and blast radius.
Shows enemy boat landing points. Red = t: Shows enemy boat landing points. Red = targeting you, yellow = targeting others.
Hover an enemy to show high-damage atom: Hover an enemy to show high-damage atom and hydrogen targets.
Adds auto economy and population nuke ac: Adds auto economy and population nuke actions to the player wheel.
Also show auto nuke options when right-c: Also show auto nuke options when right-clicking allied players.
Team games only: blocks trades with play: Team games only: blocks trades with players who are not on your team.
Blocks trades with players who are not o: Blocks trades with players who are not on your team.
Available only during an active team gam: Available only during an active team game.

Shows observed ship and train trade impo: Shows observed ship and train trade imports and exports.
Shows observed trade imports and exports: Shows observed trade imports and exports.
Highlights structures with observed trad: Highlights structures with observed trade revenue.
Hover a player to highlight the partner: Hover a player to highlight the partner industry that fuels their exports.

Show a notification when a game is found: Show a notification when a game is found
Matches team lobbies with more than 4 pl: Matches team lobbies with more than 4 players per team.
You can turn on all three at the same ti: You can turn on all three at the same time. Only one of them has to match.
Default case with no explicit starting g: Default case with no explicit starting gold.
Include requires a match. Exclude blocks: Include requires a match. Exclude blocks an option. For starting gold, any included value is enough, while excluded values are always rejected.

Only join lobbies whose max player count: Only join lobbies whose max player count is greater than this number.
You can turn on all four at the same tim: You can turn on all four at the same time. Only one of them has to match.
Send a transport with 1% troops, then re: Send a transport with 1% troops, then restore the attack ratio.
Moves alliance requests and renewal prom: Moves alliance requests and renewal prompts into a separate right-side window.
Right-click any tile to send a boat with: Right-click any tile to send a boat with 1% troops, then restores your ratio.
